3066850.name: Endless Night
3066850.description:
Endless Night is a pixel art Horror/Puzzle game about surviving the night in the forest.

Set foot in the forest in an attempt to escape from your problems and the guilt you feel because of what happened. However, the what you encounter in the woods is far worse than anything you could have brought upon yourself…


Play through five parts as you gather materials, solve puzzles, and...
Don't get caught...

Each part has a different objective you must complete in order to beat it.
Whether it be collecting firewood, unlocking a mysterious cabin, surviving enough time, or something else.

Secrets are hidden all through this game, and it's your job to piece them together.
3066850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
